finding: Google AdSense code (ca-pub, adsbygoogle) NOT FOUND anywhere in the codebase.

active_ad_technology.placement: Deferred loading via requestIdleCallback, below hero content

adsense_safe_rendering_plan.rule: AdSense code must ONLY load on pages where ADSENSE_APPROVED_PAGE = true
adsense_safe_rendering_plan.implementation: Create ADSENSE_APPROVED_PAGE logic. By default, exclude from: noindex, auth, dashboard, lab, placeholder pages. Only load on indexable, quality pages.
adsense_safe_rendering_plan.note: When AdSense code is added, must NOT be global like Adsterra currently is. Must be conditional.

adsterra_issue.current_state: Adsterra banner loads on ALL pages including noindex/auth
adsterra_issue.detail: While not AdSense, having ads on auth/noindex pages signals poor ad placement practices to reviewers.
adsterra_issue.fix: Add same conditional logic to Adsterra: only show on ADSENSE_APPROVED_PAGE pages.

adsense_code_placement_audit.overall_status: READY — no AdSense code to clean up. But Adsterra is global.
